raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tad zelleetees / fur juhs
bijat flehpufchees / un uhsneem-
meet to Pilsfahtu/ jo tas Klungs
juhsu Deews irr to juhto Roh-
kâ derwis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad juhs to Pilsfahtu
effat uhsnehmufchi / tad buhs
jums to Pilsfahtu ar Ugguni
fadedsinaht/ pehz ta KUNGA
Wahrdu buhsjums darriht/ rau-
gajt / es efinu jums to paweh-
leits.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fuhttja tohs Josuus:
un fee gabje patlehptees/ un tur-
rejahs starp Beteli / un starp Al-
ju/ Ajat prett Wakkarn/ bet Jo-
suüs palikke zaur Nakti starp
teem Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Josuus zehlahs Rih-
tâ agri/ un lihdsinaja tohs Lan-
dis / un wiꞥſch un Israëka
Wezzajee zehlahs teem Laudim
Preefschâ prett Ajn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta lihds arridsan wiꞥſi
Karrn-Wihri / kas pee ta bija/
zehlahs/ un tee peegabje un nahze
prett to Pilsfahtu/ un apmettahs
prett Seemeta Puſſi no Ajas/
un tur bija Eelefja starp teem/ un
starp Ajas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch nehme arridsan
kahdus peeztuhkstoſchus Wihrs/
un likke tohs fleppeni turretees
starp Beteles/ un starp Ajas/
tam Pilsfahtam prett Wakkarn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee lihdsinaja tohs Lan-
dis/ wiꞥſu to Lehgeri / kas prett
Seemeta puſſi ta Pilsfahta bija/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ta ka winna Gals bija prett ta
Pilsfahta Wakkara puffes/ un
Jesuüs gabje tanni Nakti Ee-
letjas Widdû.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tas Rehnixsch na
Ajas to redſeja/ tad steidsahs tee,
un zehlahs Rihtâ agri / un ta
Pilsjahta Wihti isgabje Israë-
tam pretti us Kaufchann/winsch
un wiſſi winna Laudis nosazzita
Weetâ / preefsch Klatjuma / be-
winsch ne finnaja/ka Zitti fleppe-
ni turrejahs pakkat to Pilsfahtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Josuüs un wiſſ Isra-
els lihkahs itt kaſchu kauti effoch
winno Breefschâ / un behds
pa Tuksnefes Zeltu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz tappe fafanet
wiſſi Laudis/ kas Pilsfahta bi-
ja/ ka tee winnam pakkatdshtohs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee dsinnahs Josuüm
pakkat/ un fschihrahs fawrup na
Pilsfahta/ un tur ne atlifke ne-
kahds Wihrs eeksch Ajas un Be-
teles/ kas ne buhtu isgabjis Isra-
etam pakkat / un tee pamette ta
Pilsfahtu atwehra/ un dsinnahs
Israëtam pakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad faztja tas KUNGE
us Josuü: Jessteep to Schkeh-
pu/ kas tawa Rohkâ irr / pret-
Aju/ jo es dohſchu to tawa Roh-
kâ/tad issteep Josuus to Schkeh-
pu/ kas winna Rohkâ bija pret-
to Pilsfahtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs tee/ kasflep-
pent turrejahs/ tuhdazin no fa-
was Weetas / un peeskrehje / ka-
mebr wiꞥſch fatwu Rohkn isstee-
pe/ un nahze Pilsfahta/ un uhs-
nehm
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
